_note: Model-owned controlled vocabulary seeded as metaobject entries. Derived from scripts/scraper/taxonomy.json; swatches + finishes are curated placeholders. Seed order follows this file (material/colour before finish).

fields.label: Solid Gold
fields.description: Jewellery made entirely of gold alloy; purity captured separately.

fields.label: Gold Vermeil
fields.description: Thick layer of gold over a sterling silver base.

fields.label: Gold Plated
fields.description: Layer of gold over a brass or steel base.

fields.label: Sterling Silver
fields.description: 92.5% silver alloy.

fields.label: Platinum
fields.description: Naturally white precious metal used in fine and bridal jewellery.

fields.label: Stainless Steel
fields.description: Tarnish-resistant steel or titanium base metal.

fields.label: Mixed Metal
fields.description: Combination of two or more metal colours or materials.

fields.label: Chain
fields.description: Necklace whose interest is the metal links themselves; worn alone or as a layering base.

fields.label: Choker
fields.description: Short necklace sitting tight at the base of the neck, roughly 35-40cm.

fields.label: Pendant
fields.description: Chain carrying a single focal drop such as a coin, medallion, amulet, cross or initial.

fields.label: Locket
fields.description: Pendant that opens to hold a photo or keepsake.

fields.label: Lariat
fields.description: Open-ended necklace that drapes or pulls through itself in a Y shape.

fields.label: Station
fields.description: Chain with gems or motifs spaced at intervals along its length.

fields.label: Tennis Necklace
fields.description: Continuous line of uniformly set stones around the whole length.

fields.label: Beaded Necklace
fields.description: Necklace of strung beads or pearls rather than metal links.

fields.label: T-Bar
fields.description: Chain fastened or decorated with a horizontal bar toggle at the front.

fields.label: Band
fields.description: Continuous metal band without a focal stone, including wide cigar bands.

fields.label: Signet
fields.description: Flat-faced ring, traditionally engravable.

fields.label: Stacking
fields.description: Slim ring designed to be worn in combination with others.

fields.label: Eternity
fields.description: Stones set uniformly all or half the way around the band.

fields.label: Solitaire
fields.description: Single focal stone on a plain band.

fields.label: Halo
fields.description: Centre stone encircled by smaller pave stones.

fields.label: Three Stone
fields.description: Three or paired stones set in a row.

fields.label: Cluster
fields.description: Multiple small stones grouped into one motif.

fields.label: Cocktail
fields.description: Oversized decorative ring with a dominant stone or motif.

fields.label: Dome
fields.description: Rounded, puffed profile where the metal shape is the focus.

fields.label: Chain Ring
fields.description: Flexible ring made of chain links.

fields.label: Open Ring
fields.description: Band with a deliberate gap or wrap, often adjustable.

fields.label: Pinky
fields.description: Small-sized ring styled for the little finger.

fields.label: Stud
fields.description: Earring that sits directly on the lobe on a post.

fields.label: Hoop
fields.description: Closed circular earring, from small to oversized.

fields.label: Huggie
fields.description: Small hinged hoop that hugs the lobe.

fields.label: Drop
fields.description: Earring that hangs below the lobe with movement.

fields.label: Chandelier
fields.description: Multi-tiered, elaborate drop earring.

fields.label: Ear Cuff
fields.description: Clamps onto the ear, no piercing needed.

fields.label: Climber
fields.description: Earring that runs up the ear line from the lobe.

fields.label: Threader
fields.description: Fine chain pulled through the piercing.

fields.label: Chain Bracelet
fields.description: Linked-metal bracelet.

fields.label: Bangle
fields.description: Rigid closed circle that slips over the hand.

fields.label: Cuff
fields.description: Rigid bracelet with an opening at the back.

fields.label: Tennis Bracelet
fields.description: Continuous line of uniformly set stones.

fields.label: Charm Bracelet
fields.description: Bracelet carrying one or more hanging charms.

fields.label: Beaded Bracelet
fields.description: Bracelet of strung beads or pearls.

fields.label: Cord
fields.description: Fabric or leather cord bracelet, often with a metal motif.

fields.label: Chunky
fields.description: Visually heavy, wide or thick proportions.

fields.label: Dainty
fields.description: Small-scale and fine in proportion.

fields.label: Minimalist
fields.description: Clean, unadorned design about restraint rather than size.

fields.label: Classic
fields.description: Conventional forms that do not date, such as plain bands, solitaires and pearls.

fields.label: Modern
fields.description: Contemporary, design-led, architectural aesthetic.

fields.label: Vintage
fields.description: Antique-inspired detailing such as milgrain, filigree and old cuts.

fields.label: Organic
fields.description: Fluid, irregular, molten or nature-derived forms.

fields.label: Textured
fields.description: Visible surface work such as hammering, ridges or twists.

fields.label: Geometric
fields.description: Angular shapes as the central motif.

fields.label: Celestial
fields.description: Star, moon, sun and constellation motifs.

fields.label: Romantic
fields.description: Hearts, bows, ribbons and love symbolism.

fields.label: Talisman
fields.description: Symbolic or protective motifs such as evil eyes, amulets, zodiac and chakra.

fields.label: Personalised
fields.description: Made individual through initials, engraving, names or birthstones.

fields.label: Everyday
fields.description: Low-key staples meant for constant wear.

fields.label: Boho
fields.description: Relaxed, beachy, festival-leaning aesthetic with shells, cords and mixed beads.

fields.label: Diamond
fields.description: Natural diamond.

fields.label: Lab-Grown Diamond
fields.description: Laboratory-created diamond.

fields.label: Moissanite
fields.description: Brilliant lab-created silicon carbide stone.

fields.label: Cubic Zirconia
fields.description: Affordable lab-created diamond simulant.

fields.label: Pearl
fields.description: Natural or cultured pearl.

fields.label: Sapphire
fields.description: Corundum gemstone, classically blue.

fields.label: Emerald
fields.description: Green beryl gemstone.

fields.label: Ruby
fields.description: Red corundum gemstone.

fields.label: Amethyst
fields.description: Purple quartz.

fields.label: Aquamarine
fields.description: Pale blue beryl.

fields.label: Topaz
fields.description: Topaz gemstone, commonly blue or white.

fields.label: Citrine
fields.description: Yellow quartz.

fields.label: Garnet
fields.description: Deep red gemstone.

fields.label: Peridot
fields.description: Yellow-green gemstone.

fields.label: Opal
fields.description: Iridescent gemstone.

fields.label: Moonstone
fields.description: Feldspar with a milky adularescence.

fields.label: Turquoise
fields.description: Opaque blue-green stone.

fields.label: Malachite
fields.description: Banded green stone.

fields.label: Lapis Lazuli
fields.description: Deep blue stone with gold flecks.

fields.label: Mother of Pearl
fields.description: Iridescent shell lining.

fields.label: Onyx
fields.description: Black opaque stone.

fields.label: Enamel
fields.description: Coloured surface accent merchandised like a stone colour.

fields.label: Claw
fields.description: Stone held by metal claws; UK term for prong setting.

fields.label: Bezel
fields.description: Metal rim encircling the stone.

fields.label: Pavé
fields.description: Surface paved with many tiny stones.

fields.label: Channel
fields.description: Stones set in a row between two metal walls.

fields.label: Flush
fields.description: Stone sunk level with the metal surface.

fields.label: Tension
fields.description: Stone held by pressure so it appears to float.
